title: Ivy-Green Australian Pea Salt-Block Pilaf
description: A floral and springy crowd-pleaser featuring vegetable stock, rest-meat, and a unique salt-block cooking method.
instructions: Slice the Ivy Leaves into thin strips.
Wash and roughly chop the Fresh Green Peas.
Thinly slice the Chicken Breast, remove bones if any.
Crush the Vegetable Stock Cube to a paste with water.
Gently cook the salt block at medium heat until hot but not smoking.
Place the Salt Block on a flat surface and add the crushed Vegetable Stock.
Place the Chicken Breast and Peas onto the Salt Block, cover with foil if necessary.
Cook for 10 minutes covered, then remove the foil for the last few minutes of cooking to create a flavorful crust.
Once done, carefully transfer the mixture from the Salt Block to a plate or serving dish.
Garnish with chopped Mixed Greens and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
